catalogData.name: Destruction
properties: Unphased (can't gain Frightened or Wounded status)

powers.name: Burn It Down
powers.raw: Burn It Down (Trait): Objects, vehicles, and Mana Barriers have Liability on damage resistance tests against spirit's attacks
powers.text: Objects, vehicles, and Mana Barriers have Liability on damage resistance tests against spirit's attacks

powers.name: Menacing Visage
powers.raw: Menacing Visage (Trait): You gain +Force/3 augmentation bonus on Influence tests to intimidate someone
powers.text: You gain +Force/3 augmentation bonus on Influence tests to intimidate someone

powers.name: Animal Form
powers.raw: Animal Form (Major Action, Sustained): Change into animal totem. Retain stats, but can't use attacks/powers.
powers.text: Change into animal totem. Retain stats, but can't use attacks/powers.

powers.name: Burstfire
powers.raw: Burstfire (Complex Action): Cast Fireball at Force centered on self. Can't use if already used in this Combat Turn or Turn before.
powers.text: Cast Fireball at Force centered on self. Can't use if already used in this Combat Turn or Turn before.

powers.name: Instigate
powers.raw: Instigate (Complex Action): Cast Influence at Force, but can only incite violence
powers.text: Cast Influence at Force, but can only incite violence

powers.name: Skill Guidance
powers.raw: Skill Guidance (Complex Action, Sustained): Target gains +2 augmentation bonus to Close Combat, Firearms, or Projectile Weapons if unaugmented skill ≤ Force
powers.text: Target gains +2 augmentation bonus to Close Combat, Firearms, or Projectile Weapons if unaugmented skill ≤ Force

greatFormPowers.name: Baleful
greatFormPowers.raw: Baleful (Trait): Gain +6 DV to attacks instead of +2
greatFormPowers.text: Gain +6 DV to attacks instead of +2
